headline: Fleming Initiative and Cepheid Launch Landmark Study of Rapid Testing for Drug-Resistant Infections
summary: LONDON & SUNNYVALE, Calif., June 11, 2026--The Fleming Initiative, a partnership established by Imperial College London and Imperial College Healthcare NHS Trust to combat antimicrobial resistance (AMR), and Cepheid, a Danaher company, today announced the launch of TRACE-CPE, a two-and-a-half-year research study to improve testing for AMR, one of the greatest global health challenges.
